scope: FQ-03: equipment data model and character-owned gear slots — one shared foundation for sword, tools, armor, rings, amulet, and accessory before FQ-04 makes gear live.
summary: Data surface: data/equipment.json defines 12 gear slots (each with an accepts slot_type) and equipment items {display_name, slot_type, description, effects} — pick_basic (pick_tier 1), pick_forged (pick_tier 2), axe_crude (axe_tier 1), and the inert ring_band. The BlockRegistry autoload loads it and exposes equipment_slots/equipment_slot/equipment_item/item_fits_slot/normalize_equipment plus data-driven pick_item_for_tier/axe_item_for_tier. Authority model: tool_tier/axe_tier stay the live mining authority (mining, forge_pick/forge_axe, and all 142 prior smoke checks untouched); equipment is the persistence + display shape — player.equipped_dict() derives the pickaxe/axe slots from live tiers at read time, the 10 other slots live in player.equipment as normalized slot-ready data. player.equip_item(slot, item) validates fit; tool slots reject clearing so an unequip can never silently downgrade mining (review fix). Persistence: character records gain an equipment dict (new characters: basic pick + 11 empty); save_character_carried gained an optional equipment param ({} = leave stored gear untouched, keeping 4-arg legacy callers safe); both carried-state migration branches persist derived gear immediately. Backpack inventory is fully separate from gear. UI: read-only EQUIPMENT section in the inventory panel listing all 12 slots with item names or (empty).
acceptance: Current characters migrate to starter pickaxe and current axe state without losing inventory (fq03_legacy_character_migrates: pick 2 / axe 1 / dirt 3 preserved; pick_forged + axe_crude derived and persisted onto the record)
Gear slots save/load with the character across worlds (equipment rides on the shell.json character record; ring_band round-trips save -> wipe -> load)
Empty slots are valid and visible (panel shows all 12 slots with (empty); an empty amulet survives the round-trip)
Smoke verifies at least one equipped item round-trips (fq03_equipped_item_round_trips)
Pick/axe behavior preserved: tiers remain live authority; forge paths and all wave_f/mining baselines unchanged
Smoke 149/149 (was 142) on windowed Godot 4.6.1; validator PASS incl. new equipment schema block; capsule doctor healthy; git diff --check clean
No unrelated feature work: no combat, no drag/drop, rings/armor stay inert per queue scope
validation: python scripts/validate_repo.py -> PASS incl. equipment schema (12 slots, required items incl. ring_band, slot_type coherence, tool tiers, null-safe)
COHERONIA_SMOKE=1 waited windowed run -> 149/149 PASS incl. seven fq03_* checks; fresh results file verified by LastWriteTime
decisions: tool_tier/axe_tier remain the live mining authority; equipment is the persistence/display shape with tool slots derived at read time — zero regression risk to mining, forging, and the existing suite, with FQ-04 free to flip authority when gear becomes live
Equipment items carry their tier in effects (pick_tier/axe_tier) so new picks/axes slot in via data, with pick_item_for_tier resolving the best item for a numeric tier
Tool slots cannot be cleared via equip_item (review fix): tiers come from forging; unequipping must not silently downgrade mining
save_character_carried's equipment param defaults to {} meaning leave-stored-gear-untouched, so legacy 4-arg callers (Wave B smoke, tests) stay valid
Both pre-FQ-03 migration branches persist derived gear immediately (review fix) instead of waiting for the next explicit save
ring_band is validator-required because smoke references it by id (review fix)

Orchestration: Explore recon agent -> orchestrator implementation -> Windows verification (149/149 first run) -> sonnet review agent (no must-fix; 2 should-fix + 3 nits applied, 1 nit accepted) -> full re-verification green
risks: The 10 non-tool slots hold data but no gameplay effects until FQ-04; no equip/unequip UI interaction exists (panel read-only, equip_item is the API); items are not acquirable in play yet
A hypothetical pick tier above 2 has no matching item — gear shape records pick_forged while carried_tool_tiers preserves the live tier; unreachable today (forge caps at 2)
equipment.json slot list and the validator's EXPECTED_SLOTS are intentionally locked in step
next_action: FQ-04: first combat gear slice — sword, armor mitigation, toolbelt display.
